title: Tutla Client
description: TutlaClient is a mod that adds many utility features
body:
# TutlaClient **TutlaClient** is a fully featured Minecraft client featuring many utility keybinds, rendering utilities & pvp tools! --- ## ⚙️ Features & Usage - ⚡ Easy to use - 🌀 Amazing and Modern UI - 🛠️ Many modules ### 🕹️ Features
🖲️ Modules
| ⚙️ Category | 💻 Module | 📖 Description | |---------------|------------------|-----------------------------------------------------| | ⚔️ PvP | LeaveThisGoBack! | Double click a slot to go back to the previous slot | | 󰹑 Rendering | ClearWater | See in water | | 󰹑 Rendering | FullBright | See in darkness | | 󰹑 Rendering | NoFire | Disables fire from covering your screen | | 󰹑 Rendering | NoHurtCam | Prevents shake when damaged | | 󰹑 Rendering | NoPortalOverlay | Removes portal overlay | | 󰹑 Rendering | NoPumpkinHead | Removes pumpkin head overlay | | 󰹑 Rendering | NoViewBob | Prevents bob while walking |
🌀 Key Binds
Scroll to Tutla Client in controls menu to see it | ⌨️ Keybind | 📖 Description | |-------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------| | Open Menu | Open TutlaClient menu | | Leave | Leave a server with a keybind |
--- ## 🛠️ Configuration Configure via the in-game menu (Default key: `k`) --- ## 🚧 Coming Soon - 🌀 Many utility keybinds - 🛠️ Much more! --- ## 💬 Support, Tracking & More - 💬 Join our [**Discord**](https://discord.tutla.net) for sneak peeks & community support - ⭐ Star us on [**GitHub**](https://github.com/TutlaMC/tutlaclient) - 🌐 Visit our [**Website**](https://tutla.net) for updates - 💙 Contribute by [**donating**](https://donatr.ee/tutlamc?utm_source=copy&utm_medium=share) Think we’re missing something? **Contribute on [GitHub](https://github.com/TutlaMC/tutlaclient)** --- ## 🧪 Other Tutla Studio Projects - 🏃‍♂️️ [**Manhunt+**](https://modrinth.com/plugin/manhunt+) – #1 Manhunt Plugin - ⚔️ [**PvP+**](https://modrinth.com/plugin/pvp+plugin) – A Comprehensive PvP Plugin for Paper servers - 🛡️ [**LeaveBind!**](https://modrinth.com/mod/leavebind) – Leave the server with a click of a button - 🧾 [**Leave This, GoBack!**](https://modrinth.com/mod/leave-this-go-back) – Pressing on a slot twice returns you back to the previous slot. Useful for attribute swapping / quick tool swapping / mace pvp
